channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Cowboys Host Eels in Round 10 NRL Clash at Queensland Country Bank Stadium
item.description: In Round 10 of the 2026 NRL Premiership, the North Queensland Cowboys hosted the Parramatta Eels at the Queensland Country Bank Stadium in Townsville. The match featured several standout moments, incl...

item.title: Understanding Perioral Dermatitis and How Skincare Overuse Can Trigger It
item.description: Perioral dermatitis is a growing skin condition marked by small red bumps around the mouth, nose and eyes. Often misdiagnosed as acne, it is actually an inflammatory reaction linked to overuse of skin...

item.title: Mastercard and Yellow Card to expand stablecoin payments in Kenya and Africa
item.description: Mastercard and Yellow Card have teamed up to bring stablecoin-based payment solutions to several regions including Kenya, Ghana, Nigeria, South Africa, and the UAE. The collaboration focuses on improv...

item.title: Venice Biennale 2026: Art Amidst Chaos and Contemplation
item.description: The 2026 Venice Biennale has faced an exceptionally turbulent run-up, with countries withdrawing, exhibitions cancelled, artists dismissed, and curatorial upheaval following the death of Koyo Kouoh. D...

item.title: NPS Takes Action Against Male Officer Harassing Female Traffic Officer in Nakuru
item.description: The National Police Service (NPS) in Kenya has officially condemned the harassment of a female traffic officer while on duty in Nakuru, an incident which went viral on social media. According to the O...

item.title: Anika Wells repays over $10,000 following audit of travel expenses
item.description: Communications Minister Anika Wells has reimbursed over $10,100, which includes a $2,000 penalty, after an audit revealed four travel claims breached parliamentary rules. Wells publicly apologised for...

item.title: Pope Leo XIV’s First Year: Peace, Human Dignity, and Global Challenges
item.description: Today marks one year since Pope Leo XIV, the first American pope, was elected. Over his first year as the 267th leader of the Catholic Church, his pontificate has been defined by two central themes: p...

item.title: Gujarat canal valued at Rs 2 crore demolished after structural inspection by MLA
item.description: In a recent incident in Gujarat, a canal valued at Rs 2 crore was demolished following a structural inspection carried out by a Member of the Legislative Assembly (MLA) using a hammer test. Reports su...

item.title: Analysis of West Bengal Election Data Shows Deletion Patterns and Voting Margins
item.description: The Special Intensive Revision (SIR) process in West Bengal was a major talking point during the 2026 Assembly elections, but the election results proved to be a political earthquake, with BJP winning...

item.title: Former Deputy President Gachagua seeks police explanation over killing of PCEA pastor
item.description: Former Deputy President Rigathi Gachagua has called on the police to provide a full explanation following the shocking killing of Reverend Julius Ngari Ndumia, a minister at PCEA Tubaga Parish in Naku...

item.title: Carlton Blues show resilience despite tough 2026 AFL start
item.description: Carlton’s AFL season has started painfully with a 1-8 record, but Friday night’s clash against reigning premiers Brisbane Lions offered some optimism. Trailing by 49 points early in the third quarter,...

item.title: TVK secures majority in Tamil Nadu Assembly with communist parties' support, Vijay meets Governor to form government
item.description: In a significant political development in Tamil Nadu, the Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) led by actor-turned-politician Vijay has crossed the majority mark in the Assembly after receiving unconditiona...

item.title: Nadia Sawalha temporarily steps back from Loose Women amid controversy over social media posts
item.description: Nadia Sawalha, long-standing panellist on the ITV programme Loose Women, has been temporarily removed from the show following accusations of promoting anti-Semitic conspiracy theories online. The 61-y...

item.title: Pentagon Declassifies Previously Unreleased UFO Documents
item.description: The Pentagon has recently released a set of previously unseen files regarding unidentified flying objects (UFOs), drawing global attention and renewed interest in the topic of extraterrestrial phenome...

item.title: Adekunle Gold drops Fuji Xtra deluxe with Olamide, Simi, and TML Vibez
item.description: Adekunle Gold don release him Fuji Xtra, wey na five-track deluxe version of him Fuji album, and e don announce say him go do live orchestral show based on the Fuji-inspired sound. The project dey fea...

item.title: Joel Dommett and Hannah Cooper announce birth of second son, Dutch Cooper-Dommett
item.description: British comedian Joel Dommett, 40, and his wife Hannah Cooper, 37, have celebrated the birth of their second child, a son named Dutch Cooper-Dommett. The couple, who already share a two-year-old son, ...

item.title: Shih Tzu Dog Successfully Revived After Cardiac Arrest During Surgery Following Car Accident in Mindanao
item.description: An 8-year-old Shih Tzu dog, affectionately called a 'miracle dog' by its owners and veterinarians, has amazed many after it was revived following a critical moment in surgery. The incident happened af...

item.title: Coimbatore records 96.66% pass rate in Class 12 exams, drops to 13th in State
item.description: Coimbatore district has seen a decline in its State ranking for the Class 12 State Board examinations, moving from fourth position last year to thirteenth in 2026. The overall pass percentage recorded...

item.title: Former Mpumalanga teacher sentenced for using fake matric certificate to secure employment
item.description: A former teacher from Amersfoort in Mpumalanga has received a suspended jail sentence after pleading guilty to fraud charges related to a fake matric certificate. Nomalanga Labane, aged 43, reportedly...

item.title: Canada to pay $8.7M settlement to Canadians impacted by 2020 CRA online account breach
item.description: The Canadian government has agreed to pay $8.7 million to settle a class‑action lawsuit stemming from a 2020 cyber attack that compromised the personal information of tens of thousands of Canadians th...
